description_long: This is a retro-style refrigerator with a smooth, rounded exterior finished in a vibrant teal color. The front features two vertical doors with long, slender, chrome handles and a lower pull-out freezer drawer, also with a chrome handle. The body is boxy with softly curved edges, giving it a classic mid-century appearance. The surface is glossy and reflective, suggesting a metal or enameled finish. There is a small, chrome emblem or badge on the lower section of the front, adding a decorative touch. No visible vents, control panels, or door seals are apparent from the exterior views.
description: A teal, retro-style refrigerator with chrome handles and a glossy, rounded finish. Features double doors and a lower freezer drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors with chrome handles, a lower freezer drawer, and a small chrome emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, unadorned teal surface and the refrigerator's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat teal back with no visible features or components.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a smooth teal surface and no additional details.
attribute_brand_logo: A small chrome emblem is visible on the lower front section, shaped like a winged badge, but no specific brand name is discernible.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, protruding chrome handles centered on each door, with a curved chrome handle on the lower freezer drawer.
